overall.description: First-person exploration of a dystopian urban shantytown in Cyberpunk 2077 at night. The player walks through a trash-filled encampment beneath a collapsed neon-lit overpass, passing homeless NPCs, vending machines, and makeshift shelters with towering skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed overpass encampment with neon lighting

events.description: moving from beneath the neon overpass into the open plaza with the golden statue

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the encampment area beneath the collapsed overpass, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: sitting on wooden crates near the starting position
walking past the golden statue in the plaza

entered.detail: large collapsed concrete structure with bright pink neon tube lighting along its beams
large golden statue of a dolphin or orca on a circular pedestal
small yellow and white temporary food stall with canopy
scattered piles of garbage and blue plastic bags on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive collapsed overpass structure illuminated with vibrant pink neon lights. The camera moves forward through a makeshift encampment with wooden benches and scattered trash, approaching a prominent golden dolphin statue in a small plaza. A few NPCs are visible, including one sitting on crates and another walking near the statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled hillside encampment with dirt path

events.description: turning left and beginning to ascend the dirt path away from the statue plaza
reaching the top of the hill where illuminated vending machines become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the statue plaza and walking up the dirt hill through scattered trash and blue tarps

notable_agents.action: walking down the dirt path toward the camera

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail leading uphill through the encampment
tall vertical digital advertisement screens displaying colorful neon graphics
bright red automated vending machine with glowing display

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and ascends a dirt path through the encampment, leaving the neon overpass behind. The path is lined with piles of blue trash bags and makeshift shelters. Tall palm trees and digital billboards become visible against the night sky as the camera approaches a set of glowing vending machines at the hill's crest.

events.description: approaching the brightly lit purple and red vending machines
turning right toward the large building with the American flag mural

agents.ego_description: walking past the glowing vending machines and turning toward a large building with patriotic signage

notable_agents.action: standing at the purple vending machine, appearing to browse items

entered.detail: row of purple automated vending machines with 'The Love' text and bright screens
tall industrial building with large American flag mural painted on the side
red and yellow illuminated sign advertising burritos

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a row of brightly lit purple vending machines where an NPC stands browsing. The path continues toward a large industrial building featuring a prominent American flag mural. The neon lighting from the machines and nearby signs illuminates the dirt path as the camera turns to approach the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: building facade with patriotic mural and food stalls

events.description: passing the large American flag mural on the building wall
returning to the open area with view of the collapsed overpass and distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking past the flag building and through the food stall area, looping back toward the open encampment

entered.detail: colorful food stalls with neon signs including one advertising 'BIG' burritos
factory smokestacks emitting smoke visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the American flag building and continues past neon-lit food stalls, including one with a prominent 'BURRITO' sign. The path loops back toward the open encampment area, with the collapsed pink neon overpass coming back into view in the distance. Industrial chimneys and the '07' skyscraper are visible against the night sky as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit shantytown that moves from the depths of a collapsed overpass up toward an industrial ridge before looping back to the encampment. It begins beneath a massive structure glowing with vibrant pink neon, gliding past wooden benches and scattered trash toward a golden dolphin statue in a small plaza. As the camera turns left, it ascends a dirt path lined with blue trash bags and makeshift shelters, leaving the overpass behind while palm trees and digital billboards emerge against the night sky. The scene then shifts past a row of glowing purple vending machines and toward a large industrial building featuring a prominent American flag mural. Finally, the camera passes neon-lit food stalls and a burrito sign before looping back toward the open encampment, bringing the pink neon overpass and the distant 07 skyscraper back into view.
